history.content:
<thought>
I am facing right (`>`). The cell directly in front of me contains lava (`L`), so moving forward now would be dangerous. To avoid lava, I should turn either up or down. Turning up would face me toward a wall, so I will turn down by turning right twice. First, I will turn right to face down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing down (`v`). The cell in front of me is floor (`.`), which means I can move forward safely. Moving forward will bring me closer to the bottom of the map, closer to the goal located on the bottom-right corner. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing down (`v`). The cell in front of me is lava (`L`), so moving forward is not safe. I need to turn to avoid the lava. Turning left will face me right (`>`), which leads to empty cells and allows me to move towards the goal on the right side of the map.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing right (`>`). The cell in front of me is floor (`.`), which is safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal on the right side of the map.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
